claim: Golli-deficient T-cells are dormant in initial clonal expansion.

result.claim: Golli-deficient T-cells are dormant in initial clonal expansion.
result.reasoning: The claim that "Golli-deficient T-cells are dormant in initial clonal expansion" is directly refuted by evidence from paper ID 14767844, "Golli protein negatively regulates store depletion-induced calcium influx in T cells." This paper explicitly states that "Golli-deficient T cells were hyperproliferative" (prop_3089) and that they "showed enhanced calcium entry upon T cell receptor stimulation." This indicates an increased, rather than dormant, activity during initial clonal expansion.

evidence.text: Golli-deficient T cells were hyperproliferative.
evidence.source: Golli protein negatively regulates store depletion-induced calcium influx in T cells.

evidence.text: Golli-deficient T cells showed enhanced calcium entry upon T cell receptor stimulation.
evidence.source: Golli protein negatively regulates store depletion-induced calcium influx in T cells.

evidence.text: Satellite cells were experimentally depleted in young adult mice to a degree sufficient to impair regeneration throughout the rest of their lives.
evidence.source: Inducible depletion of satellite cells in adult, sedentary mice impairs muscle regenerative capacity without affecting sarcopenia

evidence.text: In KRAS mutant tumors, PIK3CA mutation restores Cyclin D1 expression and G1/S cell cycle progression.
evidence.source: PIK3CA mutation uncouples tumor growth and Cyclin D1 regulation from MEK/ERK and mutant KRAS signaling

evidence.text: Viral replication contributes to the decline in CD4+ T cell numbers during HIV infection.
evidence.source: Programmed death-1–induced interleukin-10 production by monocytes impairs CD4+ T cell activation during HIV infection

evidence.text: Simultaneous depletion of both CLASPs causes a significant metaphase delay in HeLa cells.
evidence.source: Mammalian CLASPs are required for mitotic spindle organization and kinetochore alignment

evidence.text: The extended expansion of MafB/c-Maf deficient macrophages occurs without loss of differentiated phenotype and function.
evidence.source: MafB/c-Maf deficiency enables self-renewal of differentiated functional macrophages.

evidence.text: Tet-deficient MEFs cannot be reprogrammed into induced pluripotent stem cells (iPSCs) in this study.
evidence.source: Tet and TDG mediate DNA demethylation essential for mesenchymal-to-epithelial transition in somatic cell reprogramming.

evidence.text: PDS causes deregulated G2/M progression in HR-defective cells.
evidence.source: Targeting BRCA1 and BRCA2 Deficiencies with G-Quadruplex-Interacting Compounds

evidence.text: Telomere defects (TDs) are observed in BLM-deficient cells at an elevated frequency.
evidence.source: The BLM helicase contributes to telomere maintenance through processing of late-replicating intermediate structures

evidence.text: PDS induces DSB accumulation in HR-defective cells.
evidence.source: Targeting BRCA1 and BRCA2 Deficiencies with G-Quadruplex-Interacting Compounds

evidence.text: NVP-BEZ235 inhibited the proliferation of HER2-amplified BT474 cells exogenously expressing mutations.
evidence.source: NVP-BEZ235, a dual PI3K/mTOR inhibitor, prevents PI3K signaling and inhibits the growth of cancer cells with activating PI3K mutations.

evidence.text: Female iPS cells underwent random X inactivation upon differentiation.
evidence.source: Directly reprogrammed fibroblasts show global epigenetic remodeling and widespread tissue contribution.

evidence.text: Adult stem cells have a finite replication potential.
evidence.source: Human myotubes from myoblast cultures undergoing senescence exhibit defects in glucose and lipid metabolism

evidence.text: PDS causes checkpoint activation in HR-defective cells.
evidence.source: Targeting BRCA1 and BRCA2 Deficiencies with G-Quadruplex-Interacting Compounds

evidence.text: Hrde-1-deficient animals exhibit defects in gamete function that ultimately lead to sterility.
evidence.source: A nuclear Argonaute promotes multi-generational epigenetic inheritance and germline immortality

evidence.text: PDS reduces proliferation of HR-defective cells.
evidence.source: Targeting BRCA1 and BRCA2 Deficiencies with G-Quadruplex-Interacting Compounds

evidence.text: Murine ES cells can be maintained as a pluripotent, self-renewing population by LIF/STAT3-dependent signaling.
evidence.source: LIF/STAT3 controls ES cell self-renewal and pluripotency by a Myc-dependent mechanism.

evidence.text: MafB and c-Maf deficiency enables extended expansion of mature monocytes and macrophages in culture.
evidence.source: MafB/c-Maf deficiency enables self-renewal of differentiated functional macrophages.

evidence.text: Hrde-1-deficient animals exhibit steadily worsening defects in gamete formation.
evidence.source: A nuclear Argonaute promotes multi-generational epigenetic inheritance and germline immortality
